title: Chondrophora engelmannii
taxonomy: Chondrophora engelmannii is classified in the family of flowering plants known as the Celastraceae. This family is a group of about 60 to 70 species of deciduous and evergreen shrubs or small trees. The Celastraceae family is often referred to as the bittersweet family. Chondrophora engelmannii is native to parts of North America and is characterized by its compound leaves. It is a member of the order Celastrales.
